description: Stack-based buffer overflow in MultiMedia Soft AdjMmsEng.dll 7.11.1.0 and 7.11.2.7, as distributed in multiple MultiMedia Soft audio components for .NET, allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a long string in a playlist (.pls) file, as originally reported for Euphonics Audio Player 1.0.  NOTE: some of these details are obtained from third party information.
